description:
You are a Fish and Game Warden coordinating a missing-person search at Middlesex Fells Reservation, MA. Build a GPS data package in Garmin BaseCamp for two search teams using the existing fells_loop terrain reference data.

The data package must include the following waypoints in My Collection:
- Name: LKP - HAWTHORN RD | Lat: 42.4405 Lon: -71.1035 | Symbol: Flag, Blue | Comment: Last Known Position - Found cell ping 2024-11-15 14:30. Do NOT disturb site.
- Name: CP-ALPHA | Lat: 42.4440 Lon: -71.1120 | Symbol: Flag, Red | Comment: Search Sector Alpha HQ. Team leader: Brown. Priority: High.
- Name: CP-BRAVO | Lat: 42.4455 Lon: -71.0960 | Symbol: Flag, Green | Comment: Search Sector Bravo HQ. Team leader: Davis. Covers N quadrant.
- Name: ICS COMMAND POST | Lat: 42.4320 Lon: -71.1250 | Symbol: Building | Comment: ICS HQ. Bellevue Pond Parking. Contact: Capt. Lee 617-555-0142
- Name: HELICOPTER LZ NORTH | Lat: 42.4530 Lon: -71.1100 | Symbol: Airport | Comment: LZ NORTH. Cleared 40x40m. Approach from S. No obstacles.
- Name: MEDICAL STAGING | Lat: 42.4335 Lon: -71.1230 | Symbol: Medical Facility | Comment: EMS staging. 2 AMBs on standby. Contact: Medic-1 617-555-0199

The package must also include these routes:
- ALPHA SEARCH ROUTE: ICS COMMAND POST, LKP - HAWTHORN RD, CP-ALPHA, CP-BRAVO, ICS COMMAND POST
- BRAVO SEARCH ROUTE: ICS COMMAND POST, MEDICAL STAGING, LKP - HAWTHORN RD, HELICOPTER LZ NORTH, CP-BRAVO, ICS COMMAND POST

Export the final collection as a GPX file to C:\Users\Docker\Desktop\SAR_Middlesex_Fells_2024.gpx
